title: bucharea maderensis
intro: Bucharea maderensis, also known as Madeira buchera, is a type of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and stomach ulcers, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Bucharea maderensis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), improve gut health, and reduce inflammation in the body. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, tonics, or ointments for topical application.
